title: Optimization of a Calibration Protocol for Quantitative Radiography
author: Claudia de Molina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data used in the paper "Optimization of a Calibration Protocol for Quantitative Radiography”, by C. de Molina, C. Martínez, M. Desco, M. Abella submitted to  Medical Physics . 

 All of the uploaded images have a matrix size of 4320x3556 pixels (float, little endian). 

 
	 IdealMapBoneThoraxStudy_4320x3556x1.raw. Ideal bone map. 
	 IdealMapSoftThoraxStudy_4320x3556x1.raw . Ideal soft tissue map. 
	 logHighThoraxStudy_4320x3556x1.raw. Ideal high-energy radiography. 
	 logLowThoraxStudy_4320x3556x1.raw. Ideal low-energy radiography. 
 

  MaterialsStudy.7z  

  Soft tissue equivalent material study. Bone and soft tissue maps obtained with a calibration phantom with a side of 280 mm and the bone equivalent material equal to ideal cortical bone ICRU-44.  

 
	 TBoneNoduleMapA-150.img: Bone map obtained using A-150 as soft tissue equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapA-150.img. Soft tissue map obtained using A-150 as soft tissue equivalent material. 
 

 
	 TBoneNoduleMapWater_Case3mm_PMMA.img. Bone map obtained using Water in PMMA as soft tissue equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapWater_Case3mm_PMMA.img. Soft tissue map obtained using Water in PMMA as soft equivalent material. 
 

 
	 TBoneNoduleMapWATER.img. Bone map obtained using Water as soft tissue equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapWATER.img. Soft tissue map obtained using Water as soft equivalent material. 
 

 
	 TBoneNoduleMapPMMA.img: Bone map obtained using PMMA as soft tissue equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapPMMA.img. Soft tissue map obtained using PMMA as soft equivalent material. 
 

  Bone equivalent material study. Bone and soft tissue maps obtained with a calibration phantom with a side of 280 mm and the soft-tissue equivalent material equal to ideal soft tissue ICRU-44.  

 
	 TBoneNoduleMapAL_6082.img. Bone map obtained using AL6082 as bone equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapAL_6082.img. Soft tissue map obtained using AL6082 as bone equivalent material. 
 

 
	 TBoneNoduleMapALUMINUM.img. Bone map obtained using Pure aluminum as bone equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapALUMINUM.img. Soft tissue map obtained using Pure aluminum as bone equivalent material. 
 

 
	 TBoneNoduleMapB-100.img. Bone map obtained using B-100 as bone equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapB-100.img. Soft tissue map obtained using B-100 as bone equivalent material. 
 

 
	 TBoneNoduleMapTEFLON.img. Bone map obtained using Teflon as bone equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapTEFLON.img. Soft tissue map obtained using Teflon as bone equivalent material. 
 

  Results with selected phantom. Bone and soft tissue maps obtained with the selected equivalent materials (Water in case and Al-6082) in a calibration phantom with side of 280 mm.  

 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapWater_Case3mm_PMMA_AL6082.img. Bone tissue map obtained using a calibration phantom of Water in PMMA as soft equivalent material and AL6082 as bone equivalent material. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMapWater_Case3mm_PMMA_AL6082.img. Soft tissue map obtained using a calibration phantom of Water in PMMA as soft equivalent material and AL6082 as bone equivalent material. 
 

  SizeStudy.7z  

  Bone and soft tissue maps obtained using PMMA as soft tissue and Al-6082 as bone equivalent materials in a calibration phantom with different sizes.  

 
	 TBoneNoduleMap50.img. Bone map using a calibration phantom with a side of 50 mm. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMap50.img. Soft tissue map using a calibration phantom of 50 mm with a side of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 TBoneNoduleMap100.img. Bone map using a calibration phantom with a side of 100 mm. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMap100.img. Soft tissue map using a calibration phantom with a side of 100 mm. 
	 TBoneNoduleMap150.img. Bone map using a calibration phantom of 150 mm with a side of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMap150.img. Soft tissue map using a calibration phantom with a side of 150 mm. 
	 TBoneNoduleMap200.img. Bone map using a calibration phantom of 200 mm with a side of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMap200.img. Soft tissue map using a calibration phantom with a side of 200 mm. 
	 TBoneNoduleMap250.img. Bone map using a calibration phantom of 250 mm with a side of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 TSoftTissueNoduleMap250.img. Soft tissue map using a calibration phantom with a side of 250 mm. 
 

  RealCalibrationData.7z  

  Low- and high-energy projections obtenined with different calibration phantoms in the real scanner.  

 
	 PMMA-50-AL6082-50_70kVp_3556x4320x1.raw. Real acquisition at 70 kVp of a phantom of 50 mm composed of PMMA and Al-6082 with a matrix size of 3556x4320, float, little endian. 
	 PMMA-50-AL6082-50_140kVp_3556x4320x1.raw. Real acquisition at 140 kVp of a phantom of 50 mm composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-100-AL6082-100_70kVp_3556x4320x1.raw. Real acquisition at 70 kVp of a phantom of 100 mm composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-100-AL6082-100_140kVp_3556x4320x1.raw. Real acquisition at 140 kVp of a phantom of 100 mm composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-150-AL6082-150_70kVp_3556x4320x1.raw. Real acquisition at 70 kVp of a phantom of 150 mm composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-150-AL6082-150_140kVp_3556x4320x1.raw. Real acquisition at 140 kVp of a phantom of 150 mm composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 WATER-150-AL6082-150_70kVp_3556x4320x1.raw. Real acquisition at 70 kVp of a phantom of 150 mm composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082. 
	 WATER-150-AL6082-150_140kVp_3556x4320x1.raw. Real acquisition at 140 kVp of a phantom of 150 mm composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082. 
 

  RealThoraxData_Protocol1.7z  

  Bone and soft tissue maps of the PBU-60 thorax phantom obtained using the tested calibration phantoms in the real scanner with an SID of 100 cm.  

 
	 PMMA-50-AL6082-50_TBoneNoduleMap_KAGA_3556x4320x1.raw. Real bone map of the thorax using a 50 mm calibration phantom composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-50-AL6082-50_TSoftTissueNoduleMap_KAGA_3556x4320x1.raw. Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 50 mm calibration phantom composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-100-AL6082-100_TBoneNoduleMap_KAGA_3556x4320x1.raw. Real bone map of the thorax using a 100 mm calibration phantom composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-100-AL6082-100_TSoftTissueNoduleMap_KAGA_3556x4320x1.raw. Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 100 mm calibration phantom composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-150-AL6082-150_TBoneNoduleMap_KAGA_3556x4320x1.raw. Real bone map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration phantom composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 PMMA-150-AL6082-150_TSoftTissueNoduleMap_KAGA_3556x4320x1.raw. Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 50 mm calibration phantom composed of PMMA and Al-6082. 
	 WATER-150-AL6082-150_TBoneNoduleMap_KAGA_3556x4320x1.raw. Real bone map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082. 
	 WATER-150-AL6082-150_TSoftTissueNoduleMap_KAGA_3556x4320x1.raw. Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082. 
 

  RealThoraxData_Protocol2.7z  

  Bone and soft tissue maps of the PBU-60 thorax phantom obtained using the Water-150-Al6082.150 calibration phantom in the real scanner with an SID of 150 cm  

 
	  TBoneDecomp_70kVp_140kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_MQ_3556x4320x1.img.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 70 and 140 kVp at medium quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TSoftTissueDecomp_70kVp_140kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_MQ_3556x4320x1.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 70 and 140 kVp at medium quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TBoneDecomp_70kVp_140kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_HQ_3556x4320x1.img.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 70 and 140 kVp at high quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TSoftTissueDecomp_70kVp_140kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_HQ_3556x4320x1.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 70 and 140 kVp at high quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TBoneDecomp_60kVp_120kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_MQ_3556x4320x1.img.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 60 and 120 kVp at medium quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TSoftTissueDecomp_60kVp_120kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_MQ_3556x4320x1.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 60 and 120 kVp at medium quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TBoneDecomp_60kVp_120kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_HQ_3556x4320x1.img.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 60 and 120 kVp at high quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TSoftTissueDecomp_60kVp_120kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_HQ_3556x4320x1.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 60 and 120 kVp at high quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TBoneDecomp_70kVp_120kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_MQ_3556x4320x1.img.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 70 and 120 kVp at medium quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TSoftTissueDecomp_70kVp_120kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_MQ_3556x4320x1.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 70 and 120 kVp at medium quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TBoneDecomp_70kVp_120kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_HQ_3556x4320x1.img.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 70 and 120 kVp at high quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
	  TSoftTissueDecomp_70kVp_120kVp_SID150cm_LungAEC_HQ_3556x4320x1.  Real soft tissue map of the thorax using a 150 mm calibration with a phantom composed of water in a case of 3 mm and Al-6082 with 70 and 120 kVp at high quality of the AEC measured in the lungs. 
 

  CoefficientsTable.7z  

  An excel table with all the coefficients for the real and simulated cases.
